# Ghostly

> Ghostly is a voice-first typing app for macOS. It lives in the menu bar: press a shortcut, talk, and your words land in the active app. Speech-to-text runs on-device using Whisper — audio never leaves the Mac. Optional AI cleanup (Apple Intelligence, OpenAI, Anthropic) polishes the transcript; only text is sent, never audio.

Ghostly is Apple Silicon only — macOS 12+ on any Mac with an M1, M2, M3, or M4 chip. Intel Macs are not supported. This is a deliberate decision: Ghostly runs every AI model on-device (Whisper via Metal, optional Apple Intelligence cleanup via the Neural Engine), and real-time local transcription needs the unified memory and ML accelerators that only Apple Silicon has. The app is distributed as a signed `.dmg` and requires microphone and accessibility permissions. First launch downloads a Whisper model (500 MB–1.6 GB depending on variant: Small, Medium, Turbo, Large).

## Key facts

- Platform: Apple Silicon only (M1, M2, M3, M4) on macOS 12 or later — Intel Macs not supported
- Pricing: Free tier has full feature parity (all Whisper models, AI cleanup, per-app prompts, screenshot vision), capped at 30 minutes of transcription per week on one Mac. Pro is a one-time $39 purchase — unlimited transcription, install on up to 3 Macs, lifetime updates. No subscription.
- Privacy: On-device transcription. No analytics. No telemetry. Audio never transmitted.
- Download: https://downloads.try-ghostly.com/Ghostly-latest.dmg

## Links

- [Homepage](https://try-ghostly.com/): Product overview, features, download
- [Download (.dmg)](https://downloads.try-ghostly.com/Ghostly-latest.dmg): Latest signed macOS installer
- [Install guide](https://try-ghostly.com/install/): How to install Ghostly on macOS
- [Privacy policy](https://try-ghostly.com/privacy/): Data handling and permissions

## How it works

1. Press and hold a global shortcut (default: `fn`).
2. Speak. Silero VAD filters silence; audio is buffered locally.
3. Release the shortcut. Whisper transcribes on-device using Metal acceleration.
4. Resulting text is pasted into the currently active app via the system clipboard.
5. Optional: post-processing (AI cleanup) rewrites the transcript for tone or grammar before paste.

## Common questions

- Does audio leave the Mac? No. Transcription is on-device. AI cleanup only sees text.
- Is it free? Yes — full feature parity on the free tier (all Whisper models, AI cleanup, every feature), capped at 30 minutes of transcription per week on one Mac. Pro ($39 one-time, no subscription) removes the cap and allows install on up to 3 Macs.
- Does it work offline? Yes, after first-run model download.
- Windows, Linux, or Intel Mac? No — Apple Silicon only (M1 or later). The AI models run on-device via Metal and the Neural Engine, and Intel hardware can't keep up without shipping audio off the machine, which defeats the privacy model.
- Apple Intelligence support? Yes, as an on-device AI cleanup option.
